content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.02%, Bank Nifty -1.01%, VIX +8.6% to 18.29 — broad-based risk-off with Realty/PSU Banks leading down. However, defensive pockets (Pharma +0.6%, IT +0.13%) and FMCG-specific catalysts (TATACONSUM +9.5%, MARICO record high) holding up. 47 minutes to close; no time for new MIS, and CNC adds into rising VIX need to clear a high bar.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24000
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.3%, CMP 123.49 above SL 121.00 (~2% buffer). VIX spike supports safe-haven thesis. SL appropriately placed; no trail needed yet at slight loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.3% gain at record high 846.90. SL already at 838 = breakeven+. Trail-gap to CMP is ~1.0% (838 vs 847) which meets the 1.0% floor. Holding SL at 838; no-op MODIFY avoided by maintaining target. Actually unchanged — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.7% winner post-Q4 (+30% YoY revenue, +91% FY26 PAT). CMP 1381, SL 1365 = ~1.2% gap, meets 1.0% trail floor. Target 1500 still valid (~8.6% upside). Holding SL at 1365 — already in profitable trail zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2% gain. SL 2740 ~2.7% below CMP 2817 — gives normal vol buffer. Target 2920 intact. Bullish Q3 print + Dahej capex catalyst pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat at +0.1%, SL 8950 unchanged from entry. No-op — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4%, CMP 10602 vs SL 10440 (~1.5% buffer). Buyback at Rs 12,000 (record date May 29) creates near-term floor — exactly the kind of post-entry catalyst worth riding through chop. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6% but Q4 results positive (PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance raised to low-double-digit). SL 470 ~1.9% below CMP 479. Thesis intact; respect SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.9%, CMP 1273.90 vs SL 1255 = ~1.5% gap which meets 1.0% floor. SL already at 1255 (breakeven+). No-op — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1230.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6%, CMP 1267.90. Trail SL from 1198 → 1230 (still ~3% below CMP, well past 1.0% floor) to lock in some gain on this earnings-driven mover (+9.5% today). Target intact. Move equals 32 pts on SL = ~2.7% tighten which is material, not noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, CMP 861 vs SL 850 (~1.3% buffer). Order book +61% YoY, strong Q4. Hold; SL placed appropriately."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat. HSBC TP raised to 9000. Board meeting May 20 (Q4 results) is binary 3+ sessions away → not in Rule 11 window yet. SL 7950 ~1.8% below CMP. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, near entry. Q4 results May 21 (7 sessions away, outside Rule 11 binary window). SL 1830 ~2.3% below CMP 1872. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0%. Research now flags BEARISH modifier (-0.10) — Tata 1mg B2C threat, ICICI TP cut to 1460 (below entry 1670). Concerning post-entry signal but SL 1610 holding 2.6% below CMP 1653. Respect SL per Rule 17; if research had been bearish pre-entry, would have skipped. Hold to SL; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. Q4 results May 21 (7 sessions, outside Rule 11 binary window). SL 4360 ~4% below CMP 4541 — wide SL, but thesis (JB merger, +39% 1Y return) supports patience. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Cancel stale HFCL MIS BUY 600 @ 133.50 placed 7796m ago (~5.4 days old). MIS orders cannot carry across sessions — this is dead order book bloat. Clean it up."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cancel pending TATACONSUM BUY 20 @ 1240. Already filled the original 40-share position at 1248 avg; pending order at 1240 is a duplicate exposure attempt on same symbol with CMP now 1267 — would not fill anyway and stacking would breach order hygiene Rule 9. Cancel."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 121 below CMP 123.49, intact buffer."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 838 already trailed to breakeven+ zone."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1365 locks gain; 1.2% gap meets trail floor."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Slight gain; SL appropriate distance."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Essentially flat; SL at entry-buffer."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 (May 29) supports hold."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 bullish; respect SL per Rule 17."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1255 above entry — already locked breakeven."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1230.00, "reasoning": "Trail SL 1198→1230 to lock partial gain on earnings catalyst."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 850 1.3% below CMP; respect."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat; Q4 on May 20 outside 3-session window."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 21 outside binary window."},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Post-entry bearish research; SL 1610 still holding. Respect SL, do not preempt."},
    {"symbol": "TORNTPHARM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 21 outside binary window; JB merger thesis intact."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "MCX (BULLISH +0.12, Q4 PAT +291%) — strongest fresh-catalyst name on the screen but at 52-week high after a 5% intraday move; chasing into rising VIX with 45 min to close is poor R:R. Watch for next-session pullback toward 3100-3120. TORNTPHARM and SUNPHARMA both have Q4 binaries on May 21 — no fresh entries in those names until post-print. THERMAX, BHARATFORG, PERSISTENT noted but no late-day BUYs warranted with VIX +8.6%.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 55% deployed across 14 CNC names — already at the upper end of safe diversification count. Today's session has been costly (realized -₹28,429 from forced exits earlier). With VIX spiking, broader index -1%, and 45 min to close, the priority is order hygiene (canceling stale HFCL and duplicate TATACONSUM) and one productive trail (TATACONSUM 1198→1230). No new admits — not from anchoring, but because (a) VIX is rising into close, (b) two strong watchlist candidates (TORNTPHARM, SUNPHARMA) have Q4 prints in the next 7 sessions and adding more would breach Rule 11 spirit on the existing pharma cluster (SUNPHARMA + TORNTPHARM + LAURUSLABS + LALPATHLAB + APOLLOHOSP — already 5 healthcare/pharma names), (c) MCX is the one genuinely qualifying BULLISH name but chasing +5% breakouts into a falling tape at 14:42 IST is the failure pattern Rule 18 + experiment philosophy warn against. Each rejected candidate has a named reason — this is not Day-13 anchoring."
}
